text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan still believes that my talents as a
trainer are better suited to a trainee smarter than
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she also knows that she's the only one who
can achieve the goal I've set for her—to become
the greatest dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho will see a field of runners
who could all be called the greatest, but she'll run
faster than any of them—no, faster than anyone
ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She declares both to her friends and the media
that she's going to make it big... as the greatest
dummy ever!
